{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans "What's coinbase?" %}

{% trans 'Coinbase is one of the most trusted and widely used cryptocurrency exchanges in the world. It offers a secure, user-friendly platform for buying, selling, and managing a broad range of digital assets. Designed for both beginners and experienced investors, Coinbase combines simplicity with advanced features and regulatory compliance.' %}

  • {% trans 'Buy, sell, and hold hundreds of cryptocurrencies' %}
  • {% trans 'Regulated and compliant with major financial standards' %}
  • {% trans 'Robust security including cold storage and 2FA' %}
  • {% trans 'Easy-to-use interface on both web and mobile' %}

{% trans 'What can you trade with Coinbase?' %}

{% trans 'With Coinbase, you can trade the following:' %}

  • {% trans 'Spot Trading' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in base asset units. Your account must have sufficient base and quote balances to trade in both directions.' %}
  • {% trans 'Perpetuals and Futures' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in base asset units. Leverage is fixed at 20x.' %}

{% trans 'Perpetuals and Futures' %}: {% trans 'Hedge Mode is not supported; trading is limited to One‑Way Mode.' %}

{% trans 'API Key Setup Process' %}

{% trans 'Follow the steps below to create and configure your API keys for KuCoin.' %}

{% include 'include/warnings.html' with warning='Never share your API keys with anyone. We use industry-standard encryption to secure your credentials.' %}

1 {% trans 'Create a coinbase Account' %}

{% trans 'If you don’t already have a coinbase account, please sign up' %} {% trans 'here' %} {% trans '.' %}

2 {% trans 'Navigate to API Management' %}

  1. {% trans 'Log in to your coinbase account.' %}
  2. {% trans "In the left-hand navigation menu, click on" %} {% trans "More" %}.
  3. {% trans "Select" %} {% trans "Advanced API" %}.

3 {% trans 'Configure Your API Key' %}

  1. {% trans "Click" %} {% trans "Create API" %}. {% comment %} {% endcomment %}
  2. {% trans 'Enter a name for the API (e.g., “IsAlgo key”).' %}
  3. {% trans 'Choose the appropriate portfolio: use "Default" for Spot trading and "Perpetuals" for Futures trading.' %}
  4. {% trans 'Enable Trade execution.' %}

4 {% trans 'Enable Security and Whitelist IP' %}

  1. {% trans "Paste our server's IP address in the IP whitelist field:" %} {{ server_ip }} {% trans "and click" %} {% trans "Add" %}.
  2. {% trans 'Complete 2FA and any other required verification.' %}
  3. {% trans "Click" %} {% trans "Confirm" %} {% trans "to generate your API Key and Secret." %}

{% trans 'Complete the Integration' %}

{% trans 'Copy your API Key and Secret, then paste them into the integration form in your IsAlgo automate dashboard. Ensure you keep your credentials safe and never share them.' %}
